title: Fix broken YAML code block in blog post
description: The yaml fenced code block with snippet include is not rendering — backticks show as literal text and YAML content renders as markdown headings. Likely the @ in path docs/blog/@context-and-@import-considered-harmful/ breaks pymdownx.snippets. Investigate and fix.

title: Create epic for blog post editing
description: Parent epic for all tasks to improve the @context & @import blog post
